description: Conducted user research and analysed product metrics using SQL and Metabase to drive data-informed decisions for feature prioritisation
Collaborated with cross-functional engineering teams to define product requirements and scope technical solutions for platform improvements
Synthesised qualitative and quantitative insights from user interviews and analytics dashboards to inform product roadmap planning

company: NUS Enterprise Minimum Viable Product Studio
description: Worked on a full-stack web application for researchers to analyse bird patterns with React and Django with PostgreSQL

Improved bird species identification across geographic regions by integrating BirdNET Machine Learning classifier using eBird API and GPS coordinate data, increasing classification accuracy compared to manual labeling

Enhanced cloud data pipeline with Python scripting to batch ingest and synchronize large volumes of bird audio recordings between local storage and Google Cloud Storage, reducing manual data entry time
Enhanced extraction of building data for geospatial applications such as Autodesk Revit by implementing C# plugin and open-source Buildings and Habitats object Model (BHoM)
